headline: APA Corporation Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Higher Oil Prices
summary: APA tops Q1 earnings estimates as lower costs and stronger oil prices offset weaker revenues and output.

raw.headline: APA Corporation Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Higher Oil Prices

headline: EQT raises bid for Intertek one last time in final takeover push
summary: Swedish private equity firm EQT has submitted a final takeover bid valuing Intertek at £9.4bn , following the rejection of three previous proposals by the British group. Should the deal proceed, it...
